mapper.select:
SELECT H.HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, H.OWNER_ID AS ownerId, H.NAME AS name, H.ADDRESS AS address, H.DETAIL_ADDRESS AS detailAddress, H.PHONE AS phone, H.DISTRICT AS district, H.LATITUDE AS latitude, H.LONGITUDE AS longitude, H.OPEN_TIME AS openTime, H.CLOSE_TIME AS closeTime, H.BREAK_TIME AS lunchTime, H.CLOSED_DAYS AS holiday, H.STATUS AS status, H.DESCRIPTION AS description, H.IMAGE_URL AS imageUrl, H.WEBSITE_URL AS websiteUrl, H.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, H.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, (SELECT LISTAGG(AT.ANIMAL_NAME, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY AT.ANIMAL_ID) FROM HOSPITAL_ANIMAL HA2 JOIN ANIMAL_TYPE AT ON HA2.ANIMAL_ID = AT.ANIMAL_ID WHERE HA2.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID) AS animalNames, (SELECT LISTAGG(MS.SERVICE_NAME, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY MS.SERVICE_ID) FROM HOSPITAL_SERVICE HS2 JOIN MEDICAL_SERVICE MS ON HS2.SERVICE_ID = MS.SERVICE_ID WHERE HS2.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID) AS serviceNames,
(SELECT LISTAGG(MS.SERVICE_NAME, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY MS.SERVICE_ID) FROM HOSPITAL_SERVICE HS3 JOIN MEDICAL_SERVICE MS ON HS3.SERVICE_ID = MS.SERVICE_ID WHERE HS3.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID AND HS3.SERVICE_ID IN #{svcId}) AS matchedServiceNames, (SELECT COUNT(SERVICE_ID) FROM HOSPITAL_SERVICE HS3 WHERE HS3.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID AND HS3.SERVICE_ID IN #{svcId}) AS matchCount,
'' AS matchedServiceNames, 0 AS matchCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM HOSPITAL_REVIEW HR WHERE HR.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID) AS reviewCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM HOSPITAL_LIKE HL WHERE HL.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FAVORITE_HOSPITAL FH WHERE FH.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID) AS zzimCount, (SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(RATING), 1), 0) FROM HOSPITAL_REVIEW HR WHERE HR.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID) AS avgRating
, (SQRT(POWER(H.LATITUDE - #{userLat}, 2) + POWER(H.LONGITUDE - #{userLng}, 2))) / 1000 AS distance , 0 AS distance FROM HOSPITAL H WHERE 1 = 1
AND TO_CHAR(SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'HH24:MI') >= H.OPEN_TIME AND TO_CHAR(SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'HH24:MI') <= H.CLOSE_TIME AND NVL(H.CLOSED_DAYS, '무') NOT LIKE '%' || SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'DAY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=KOREAN'), 1, 1) || '%'
AND (TO_CHAR(SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'HH24:MI') < H.OPEN_TIME OR TO_CHAR(SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'HH24:MI') > H.CLOSE_TIME OR NVL(H.CLOSED_DAYS, '무') LIKE '%' || SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'DAY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=KOREAN'), 1, 1) || '%')
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM HOSPITAL_ANIMAL HA WHERE HA.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID AND HA.ANIMAL_ID = #{subAnimalId}) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM HOSPITAL_ANIMAL HA JOIN ANIMAL_TYPE AT2 ON HA.ANIMAL_ID = AT2.ANIMAL_ID WHERE HA.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID AND (AT2.ANIMAL_ID = #{animalId} OR AT2.PARENT_ID = #{animalId}))
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM HOSPITAL_SERVICE HS WHERE HS.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID AND HS.SERVICE_ID IN #{svcId}) AND TRIM(H.DISTRICT) IN #{district} AND (H.NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR H.ADDRESS LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR H.DETAIL_ADDRESS LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%') ORDER BY
matchCount DESC, likeCount DESC, H.HOSPITAL_ID DESC distance ASC, H.HOSPITAL_ID DESC CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(H.NAME), '^[가-힣]') THEN 1 WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(H.NAME), '^[a-zA-Z]') THEN 2 WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(H.NAME), '^[0-9]') THEN 3 ELSE 4 END ASC, H.NAME ASC, H.HOSPITAL_ID DESC reviewCount DESC, H.HOSPITAL_ID DESC ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM HOSPITAL_LIKE HL WHERE HL.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FAVORITE_HOSPITAL FH WHERE FH.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID)) DESC, H.HOSPITAL_ID DESC matchCount DESC, H.HOSPITAL_ID DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT H.HOSPITAL_ID) FROM HOSPITAL H WHERE 1 = 1 AND TO_CHAR(SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'HH24:MI') >= H.OPEN_TIME AND TO_CHAR(SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'HH24:MI') <= H.CLOSE_TIME AND NVL(H.CLOSED_DAYS, '무') NOT LIKE '%' || SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'DAY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=KOREAN'), 1, 1) || '%' AND (TO_CHAR(SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'HH24:MI') < H.OPEN_TIME OR TO_CHAR(SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'HH24:MI') > H.CLOSE_TIME OR NVL(H.CLOSED_DAYS, '무') LIKE '%' || SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'DAY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=KOREAN'), 1, 1) || '%')
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM HOSPITAL_ANIMAL HA WHERE HA.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID AND HA.ANIMAL_ID = #{subAnimalId}) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM HOSPITAL_ANIMAL HA JOIN ANIMAL_TYPE AT2 ON HA.ANIMAL_ID = AT2.ANIMAL_ID WHERE HA.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID AND (AT2.ANIMAL_ID = #{animalId} OR AT2.PARENT_ID = #{animalId}))
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM HOSPITAL_SERVICE HS WHERE HS.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID AND HS.SERVICE_ID IN #{svcId}) AND TRIM(H.DISTRICT) IN #{district} AND (H.NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR H.ADDRESS LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR H.DETAIL_ADDRESS LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(DISTRICT) AS district FROM HOSPITAL WHERE DISTRICT IS NOT NULL ORDER BY TRIM(DISTRICT)
SELECT ANIMAL_ID AS animalId, ANIMAL_NAME AS animalName, CATEGORY AS category FROM ANIMAL_TYPE WHERE PARENT_ID IS NULL ORDER BY ANIMAL_ID
SELECT ANIMAL_ID AS animalId, ANIMAL_NAME AS animalName, CATEGORY AS category, PARENT_ID AS parentId FROM ANIMAL_TYPE WHERE PARENT_ID IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ANIMAL_ID
SELECT SERVICE_ID AS serviceId, SERVICE_NAME AS serviceName FROM MEDICAL_SERVICE ORDER BY SERVICE_ID

SELECT H.HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, H.OWNER_ID AS ownerId, H.NAME AS name, H.ADDRESS AS address, H.DETAIL_ADDRESS AS detailAddress, H.PHONE AS phone, H.DISTRICT AS district, H.LATITUDE AS latitude, H.LONGITUDE AS longitude, H.OPEN_TIME AS openTime, H.CLOSE_TIME AS closeTime, H.BREAK_TIME AS lunchTime, H.CLOSED_DAYS AS holiday, H.STATUS AS status, H.DESCRIPTION AS description, H.IMAGE_URL AS imageUrl, H.WEBSITE_URL AS websiteUrl, H.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, H.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, (SELECT LISTAGG(AT.ANIMAL_NAME, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY AT.ANIMAL_ID) FROM HOSPITAL_ANIMAL HA2 JOIN ANIMAL_TYPE AT ON HA2.ANIMAL_ID = AT.ANIMAL_ID WHERE HA2.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID) AS animalNames, (SELECT LISTAGG(MS.SERVICE_NAME, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY MS.SERVICE_ID) FROM HOSPITAL_SERVICE HS2 JOIN MEDICAL_SERVICE MS ON HS2.SERVICE_ID = MS.SERVICE_ID WHERE HS2.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID) AS serviceNames, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM HOSPITAL_REVIEW HR WHERE HR.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID) AS reviewCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM HOSPITAL_LIKE HL WHERE HL.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FAVORITE_HOSPITAL FH WHERE FH.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID) AS zzimCount, (SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(RATING), 1), 0) FROM HOSPITAL_REVIEW HR WHERE HR.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID) AS avgRating , (SQRT(POWER(H.LATITUDE - #{userLat}, 2) + POWER(H.LONGITUDE - #{userLng}, 2))) / 1000 AS distance , 0 AS distance FROM HOSPITAL H WHERE H.HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId}
SELECT HOSPITAL_ID FROM FAVORITE_HOSPITAL WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
SELECT HOSPITAL_ID FROM HOSPITAL_LIKE WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FAVORITE_HOSPITAL WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FAVORITE_HOSPITAL (MEMBER_ID, HOSPITAL_ID, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{hospitalId}, SYSTIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM FAVORITE_HOSPITAL WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM HOSPITAL_LIKE WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HOSPITAL_LIKE (MEMBER_ID, HOSPITAL_ID, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{hospitalId}, SYSTIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM HOSPITAL_LIKE WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HOSPITAL_REVIEW (REVIEW_ID, HOSPITAL_ID, MEMBER_ID, RATING, CONTENT, CREATED_AT, PET_ID) VALUES (SEQ_HOSPITAL_REVIEW.NEXTVAL, #{hospitalId}, #{memberId}, #{rating}, #{content}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{petId})
mapper.select: SELECT R.REVIEW_ID AS reviewId, R.HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, R.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, R.RATING AS rating, R.CONTENT AS content, R.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, M.NICKNAME AS nickname, R.PET_ID AS petId, R.REPLY_CONTENT AS replyContent, R.REPLY_CREATED_AT AS replyCreatedAt, R.REPLY_ROLE AS replyRole FROM HOSPITAL_REVIEW R JOIN APP_MEMBER M ON R.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID WHERE R.HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} ORDER BY R.REVIEW_ID DESC
